bucketGatePlans.riskDescription: Display/render settings may affect compositor output, rendering path, color management, XWayland availability, HDR, scanout, or KMS/display behavior.
bucketGatePlans.gatePurpose: Prevent applying display/render mutations unless a persisted recovery plan, backup, out-of-band confirmation, and rollback path are prepared before mutation.
requiredBeforeApply: row-specific pre-enablement proof remains valid
production high-risk gate accepts only the intended row and bucket
persisted recovery plan is written before mutation
verified backup exists before mutation
out-of-band confirmation token exists before mutation
timeout rollback path is proven before mutation
advanced explicit approval is recorded before mutation
live execution remains disabled unless a future approved sprint enables it with tests
bucketGatePlans.uiRequirement: Advanced display/render warning with explicit confirmation that screen output may become unusable and recovery is independent of visible output.
testRequirements: live target refusal in proof mode

bucketGatePlans.riskDescription: Cursor/input settings may hide or warp the pointer, change hardware cursor use, alter input-driven behavior, or make normal interaction unreliable.
bucketGatePlans.gatePurpose: Prevent applying cursor/input mutations unless recovery can be confirmed or reverted without relying on pointer visibility or mouse input.
requiredBeforeApply: row-specific pre-enablement proof remains valid
production high-risk gate accepts only the intended row and bucket
persisted recovery plan is written before mutation
verified backup exists before mutation
out-of-band confirmation token exists before mutation
timeout rollback path is proven before mutation
advanced explicit approval is recorded before mutation
live execution remains disabled unless a future approved sprint enables it with tests
bucketGatePlans.uiRequirement: Advanced cursor/input warning that states recovery cannot depend on mouse input, pointer visibility, app UI, or Hyprland keybinds.
testRequirements: live target refusal in proof mode

bucketGatePlans.riskDescription: Debug/crash settings may alter crash behavior, logging, compositor diagnostics, damage tracking, or explicitly trigger failure paths.
bucketGatePlans.gatePurpose: Prevent applying debug/crash mutations unless recovery survives disruption of the compositor or debug path being changed.
requiredBeforeApply: row-specific pre-enablement proof remains valid
production high-risk gate accepts only the intended row and bucket
persisted recovery plan is written before mutation
verified backup exists before mutation
out-of-band confirmation token exists before mutation
timeout rollback path is proven before mutation
advanced explicit approval is recorded before mutation
live execution remains disabled unless a future approved sprint enables it with tests
bucketGatePlans.uiRequirement: Advanced debug/crash warning that states the setting may disrupt compositor stability and requires external recovery.
testRequirements: live target refusal in proof mode

summary.whyNoRowsEnabled: This sprint defines production-capable gate and recovery requirements but does not implement the future production gate runner or approve live/runtime safety proof.

proofUsed: src/high_risk_recovery.rs persisted dry-run watchdog and backup/rollback primitives
src/write_safety.rs current screen-shader gated review primitive and allowlist rejection behavior
proofStillMissing: production gate implementation for the 63 blocked high-risk rows
persisted recovery plan runner for display/render, cursor/input, and debug/crash buckets
out-of-band confirmation runner proof for each bucket
production rollback proof against a future gated write path
future approved live/runtime proof or explicit approval to proceed without live unsafe testing
nextRecommendedSprint: Implement high-risk persisted recovery plan scaffold sprint
